title: Canada Selling Interac e-Transfer Not Currently Supported
description: Edge currently does not fully support selling cryptocurrency in Canada via Interac e-Transfer. We are working to restore support for Interac e-Transfer sales for Canada. We are sorry for the inconvenience and thank you for patience.
